VilkarListe.beskrivelse: Conditions are activities you must participate in as part of your follow-up from Nav.

ForlengetBehandlingstid.medBrev: <norsk>{navKontor}</norsk> has found that they cannot process your application within a reasonable time, and has sent you a letter. <lenke>Open the letter about processing time</lenke> to see when you can expect a response to your application.
ForlengetBehandlingstid.utenBrev: <norsk>{navKontor}</norsk> has found that they cannot process your application within a reasonable time, and has sent you a letter. Read the letter about processing time to see when you can expect a response to your application.

status.description: <norsk>{navKontor}</norsk> will process your application as soon as they can.
status.descriptionUtenNavKontor: Your Nav office will process your application as soon as they can.

oppgaver.title: You have received tasks
oppgaver.warning: Remember to submit the information by the deadline. If you have submitted the information directly to your Nav office, you can ignore this message.

vilkar.title: You have received conditions
vilkar.descriptionEmpty: As part of your follow-up from Nav, you may have received conditions. Conditions are activities or documentation requirements you must fulfil. <lenke>Read your decision letter</lenke> to see if you have received conditions.
vilkar.description: As part of your follow-up from Nav, you have been given conditions (activities) that you must fulfill:
vilkar.kanHaFlere: You may have received more conditions than those shown here. <lenke>Read your decision letter</lenke> to see if you have received more conditions.

nyttVedtak.title: You have received a new decision
nyttVedtak.description: Read the latest decision letter for more information

ikkeInnsyn.title: Cannot display status
ikkeInnsyn.description: Your application will be processed, but we cannot display the status of your application. If you have questions, you can <navKontorLenke>contact your local Nav office</navKontorLenke>, or call us at <tlf>55 55 33 33</tlf>.

behandlesIkke.title: Cannot display status
behandlesIkke.description1: We cannot show the status of your application on nav.no. This may be because your application is being processed together with another application you have submitted, or because you have withdrawn your application.
behandlesIkke.description2: If you have questions, you can <navKontorLenke>contact your local Nav office</navKontorLenke>, or call us at <tlf>55 55 33 33</tlf>.

beskrivelse.INNVILGET: You have been granted benefits. Read the decision to see the reasons.
beskrivelse.DELVIS_INNVILGET: You have been partially granted benefits. This means that you will not receive everything you applied for, but only part of it. Read the decision to see the reasons.
beskrivelse.AVVIST: Your application has been rejected. Read the decision to see the reasons.
beskrivelse.AVSLATT: Your application has been declined. Read the decision to see the reasons.

BehandlesIkkeInfo.description1: We cannot show the status of your application on nav.no. This may be because your application is being processed together with another application you have submitted, or because you have withdrawn your application.
BehandlesIkkeInfo.description2: If you have questions, you can <navKontorLenke>contact your local Nav office</navKontorLenke>, or call us at <tlf>55 55 33 33</tlf>.

IkkeInnsynInfo.description1: Your application will be processed, but we cannot display the status of your application on nav.no.
IkkeInnsynInfo.description2: If you have questions, you can <navKontorLenke>contact your local Nav office</navKontorLenke>, or call us at <tlf>55 55 33 33</tlf>.

KlageInfo.beskrivelse: If you disagree with the decision, you have the right to appeal. <klageinfo>Read more about your appeal rights</klageinfo>. The deadline for appealing is three weeks after the date of the decision. To file an appeal, you can <klageskjema>print out an appeal form (pdf)</klageskjema> that you can submit as documentation for your application.

SoknadsoppgaverReadMore.title: What is meant by missing documentation?
SoknadsoppgaverReadMore.description: Here you can see which documentation you did not submit with your application. We recommend that you submit the documentation as soon as possible. If you have delivered it directly to your Nav office, you can disregard this message.

Opplastingsboks.beskrivelse: If you have any additional information that may be relevant to your application, you can upload it here.

submissionError.TOO_MANY_FILES: You have selected too many files. The maximum number of files is 30.
submissionError.TOTAL_SIZE_TOO_LARGE: The files are too large (max 150 MB), remove files and try again.

feil.minst_ett_vedlegg: You must first select the document you want to submit.
feil.opplasting_feilmelding: We cannot forward your documentation. Please remove and correct the above files
feil.opplasting_backend_feilmelding: Sorry, we were unable to forward your documentation. Please try again later.
feil.opplasting_backend_virus_feilmelding: Your upload was stopped by our antivirus software. Please try again with a different file.
feil.opplasting_feilmelding_COULD_NOT_LOAD_DO: Sorry, we are unable to open this PDF, please try again with another file.
feil.opplasting_feilmelding_PDF_IS_SIGNED: This PDF is read-only, and we cannot process it.
feil.opplasting_feilmelding_PDF_IS_ENCRYPTED: This PDF is password-protected, and we cannot process it.
feil.opplasting_feilmelding_ILLEGAL_FILE_TYPE: The file type must be JPG, PNG or PDF.
feil.opplasting_feilmelding_ILLEGAL_FILENAME: The file name may only contain the letters a–å, the numbers 0–9 and the characters - _ . , ( )
feil.opplasting_feilmelding_FILE_TOO_LARGE: The file is too large (max 10 MB)
feil.opplasting_feilmelding_COMBINED_FILES_TO: We cannot accept your documentation if their combined size exceeds 150 MB
feil.opplasting_feilmelding_TOO_MANY_FILES: We only accept up to 20 files at a time

Filopplasting.tittel: Do you want to submit more documents?
Filopplasting.beskrivelse: If you have more relevant information regarding your application, they can be uploaded here.

VedleggListe.skjultSoknadPdf: Due to a technical error, we are unable to display a copy (PDF) of your application. This will not affect your application.

Metadata.beskrivelse: Apply for financial assistance, see the status of your application, and send documentation.

EmptyState.tittel: We can't find any applications from you
EmptyState.beskrivelse: This can be because your municipality cannot show applications submitted on paper, or your application is older than 15 months.

Footer.kontaktNavKontor: <lenke>Contact your local Nav office</lenke> or <tel>call us at 55 55 33 33</tel>.

ettersende.tittel: How can I submit additional documentation?
ettersende.content1: You can submit documents, images, and other file types to an application you have already submitted.
ettersende.content2: To submit digitally, go to the relevant application and upload the documentation there. You can also <lenke>send documentation by mail</lenke> to your Nav office, or visit <lenke>your Nav office</lenke> in person and deliver the documents there.

melde.content1: If there are changes in your situation, it may affect the follow-up or payment you receive from Nav. This could include changes in your income, family situation, or employment status. If you are married, you must also notify Nav if there are changes in your spouse's situation. <lenke>See examples of situations that may affect your payments</lenke>.
melde.content2: To report changes, you can call us at <tel>55 55 33 33</tel> or <lenke>send us a letter by mail</lenke>. You can also report digitally by going to your application and uploading the documentation there.
melde.content3: If you are unsure whether the change will affect your follow-up or payment, you can contact us by phone at <tel>55 55 33 33</tel>.

svar.tittel: When can I expect a response to my application?
svar.content1: Processing times vary at different Nav offices and can be affected by the complexity of the case and the documentation provided. If the Nav office needs more information or documentation, you will be notified.
svar.content2: The application should be processed within 4 weeks. If more than 31 days have passed since you applied without a response, you should receive a letter stating that the processing time has been extended.

lenker.snakke: Counseling about work, housing or childcare

NyttigInformasjon.personopplysninger: How we process your personal data

OpprettKlagePage.beskrivelse: Appeal the decision regarding financial social assistance.
OpprettKlagePage.navEnhet: The appeal will be sent to <norsk>{navKontor}</norsk>
OpprettKlagePage.ikkeOppgittNavEnhet: The apeal will be sent to your local Nav office

KlagePage.beskrivelse: View your submitted appeal about the decision regarding financial social assistance.

underUtviklingInfo.beskrivelse1: You can submit additional information and documentation for your appeal on this page. When the appeal is processed, you will receive a response via Digipost or physical mail.
underUtviklingInfo.beskrivelse2: You can read about <klageInfo>the appeal process and possible outcomes here</klageInfo>. If you have questions about your appeal, you can contact <navKontor>your local Nav office</navKontor> or call us at <tel>55 55 33 33</tel>.

KlagePage.seVedtak: View the decision you have appealed

KlageDokumenter.klagePdfDefaultTittel: Appeal against decision regarding financial assistance.pdf

steg1.visKlagen: View the appeal (opens in a new tab)

steg2.tittel: The Nav office is processing your appeal
steg2.beskrivelse: Your appeal is being processed as quickly as possible. The Nav office will contact you if they need more information or documentation.

steg3.beskrivelse: You will receive a decision. Read the decision to see if your appeal was upheld or not.

beskrivelse.INNVILGET: You have been granted benefits. Read the decision to see the reasons.
beskrivelse.DELVIS_INNVILGET: You have been partially granted benefits. This means that you will not receive everything you applied for, but only part of it. Read the decision to see the reasons.
beskrivelse.AVVIST: Your application has been rejected. Read the decision to see the reasons.
beskrivelse.AVSLATT: Your application has been declined. Read the decision to see the reasons.

bakgrunn.label: Provide the background for the complaint
bakgrunn.beskrivelse: To process your complaint, it is important that you explain why you disagree with the decision and what you want changed.

validering.maksLengde: You can write a maximum of {maksLengde} characters
validering.maksFiler: You can upload a maximum of {maksFiler} files

KlageForm.sendingFeilet: Failed to send the complaint. Please try again later or contact your local NAV office.

ForkastKlageModal.overskrift: Are you sure you want to discard the complaint?
ForkastKlageModal.beskrivelse: Your complaint and attachments will not be saved.

KlageFileUpload.label: Attach documentation
KlageFileUpload.beskrivelse: If you have documents that may be important for your complaint, you can upload them here. You can attach documents, images, and screenshots up to {maxSize} MB.

validering.maksFilstørrelse: The file is larger than {maksFilstørrelse} MB
validering.ugyldigFiltype: The file format is not supported.

dropzone.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop a file here

AndreUtbetalingerInfo.tittel: Do you receive other payments from Nav?
AndreUtbetalingerInfo.beskrivelse: On this page you will only find your payments for financial assistance. If you receive other payments from Nav, you can view them on the <lenke>Payments on My pages.</lenke>

ErrorPage.description: We were unable to load the page correctly. This may be due to temporary technical issues and nothing you did. You can try to
ErrorPage.relogge: log out and log in again
ErrorPage.vente: come back in a few minutes

TrengerDuRaskHjelp.sokePapir: You can also <link>apply for financial assistance on paper</link> at you Nav office.
TrengerDuRaskHjelp.nodhjelp: If you don't have money for the most essential things like food, you must contact your Nav office.
TrengerDuRaskHjelp.botilbud: Nav should also help you find temporary accommodation if you don't have a place to sleep or stay for the next few days.
TrengerDuRaskHjelp.forsideSosialhjelp: Go to the front page for financial assistance
TrengerDuRaskHjelp.forsideNav: Go to the front page for nav.no
TrengerDuRaskHjelp.mineSider: Go to the front page for My pages

periode.tittel: You have no payments for this selected period.

kommende.beskrivelse: If you have applied for and been granted financial social assistance, your benefit may have already been paid. Try changing the period.
kommende.beskrivelse2: If you still cannot find a payment or have other questions about payments, you can contact our supervisors at 55 55 33 33.

periode.beskrivelse: Try changing the period. If you still can't find a payout or have other questions about payouts, you can contact our advisors at 55 55 33 33.

UtbetalingerContentCard.lenke: View the application and the decision letter you received
UtbetalingerContentCard.flereSoknader: This payment is linked to multiple applications:

FilePreviewErrorBody.error: Something went wrong while displaying the file.

TipsReadMore.papirIntro: If you have a document on paper, you can take a photo of it and submit it digitally. Here's how:
TipsReadMore.papirStep1: Take a photo of the document with your mobile phone or tablet.
TipsReadMore.papirStep2: Check that the document is easy to read. If the document is difficult to read, you may be asked to submit it again.
TipsReadMore.papirStep3: If you want to use a computer, you can send the photo(s) to your personal email account and save the image on your device.
TipsReadMore.papirSkanner: If you have access to a scanner, you can also scan documents and submit them digitally.
TipsReadMore.nettsiderBody1: If you need to send documentation from another website, you can try to download the document as a PDF. For example, the tax return and decisions from Lånekassen are available for download as PDF.
TipsReadMore.nettsiderBody2: You should avoid taking a photo of your computer screen with your mobile phone, as this often makes the text in the images difficult to read.
TipsReadMore.problemerBody1: If the document cannot be submitted, it may be because it is larger than 10 MB or is password protected.
TipsReadMore.problemerBody2: If you are stuck, you can <ring>call our advisors at 55 55 33 33</ring> or <kontor>contact your local NAV office</kontor>.

VilkarReadMore.beskrivelse: Nav may require you to take an activity or action that will help you out of a difficult life situation and enable you to support yourself. As a general rule, Nav will set the condition in cooperation with you.
VilkarReadMore.beskrivelse2: The decision you have received contains information about the condition and what can happen if you do not meet it. <lenke>Read more about the conditions here</lenke>.
VilkarReadMore.beskrivelse3: If Nav asks you to provide documentation, it is because it is necessary to follow up on you and the activities you carry out.

Dokumentasjonkrav.beskrivelse: Nav may ask you to submit documents that provide information about your case in connection with your application. This could be, for example, a rental contract or electricity bill. You can submit the documents digitally or physically at the Nav office.

SoknadsoppgaverSection.title: We are missing some documentation for your application.
